rules.description: shell_run() stderr 오염 패턴 — subprocess 결과 파싱 오류
rules.pattern: shell-run, stderr, subprocess, python, xcelium-mcp, parsing

rules.description: SimVision: explorefull이 duplicate DB 생성 → waveform placeholder 유발
rules.pattern: simvision, tcl, database, explorefull, waveform, placeholder

rules.description: graphify 버전 드리프트 + skill↔package 불일치 → 재동기로 해결
rules.pattern: graphify, version-drift, skill-resync, venv, pin, tree-sitter-verilog
